get.description: Reads messages directly from the WhatsApp client for the given chat, bypassing the local DB. Useful for retrieving messages that arrived before the gateway was started.

parameters.name: includeMedia
parameters.description: When true, downloads media (base64) for messages that have it. Slower; default false.

parameters.name: deep
parameters.description: When true, raises the limit ceiling from 100 to 2000 for reaching further back in history (whatsapp-web.js only; loads earlier messages on demand). Forces metadata-only (includeMedia is ignored). Large/slow requests may increase WhatsApp rate-limiting risk; default false.

info.title: OpenWA API
info.description: Open Source WhatsApp API Gateway - Free, Self-Hosted HTTP API

name.description: Friendly name for the API key

allowedSessions.description: Allowed session IDs this key can access

keyPrefix.description: First 8 characters of the key (for identification)

apiKey.description: Full API key (only shown once at creation)

keyPrefix.description: First 8 characters of the key (for identification)

name.description: Unique name for the session (alphanumeric and hyphens only)

proxyUrl.description: Proxy URL for this session (e.g., http://user:pass@proxy.example.com:8080)

lastError.description: Human-readable reason for the most recent terminal engine failure (only set when status is FAILED).
lastError.example: Failed to launch the browser process: spawn /usr/bin/chromium ENOENT

phoneNumber.description: Phone number to link, digits only in international format (country code + number).

pairingCode.description: The 8-character pairing code to enter in WhatsApp.

chatId.description: Chat ID in the active engine's native format (e.g. 1234567890@c.us on whatsapp-web.js)
Chat ID in the active engine's native format (e.g. 1234567890-123@g.us on whatsapp-web.js)
Chat ID, in the active engine's native format (e.g. 1234567890@c.us)

state.description: Presence to send: 'typing' or 'recording' shows the indicator; 'paused' clears it

events.description: Event types to subscribe to. '*' subscribes to all events.

secret.description: Secret key for HMAC signature verification

headers.description: Custom headers to include in webhook requests

filters.description: Optional smart pre-filter. When set, every condition must match (AND) for the webhook to fire. Omit or null to fire on every subscribed event.

retryCount.description: Number of retry attempts on failure

filters.description: Optional smart pre-filter. When set, every condition must match (AND) for the webhook to fire. Omit or null to fire on every subscribed event.

events.description: Event types to subscribe to. '*' subscribes to all events.

filters.description: Optional smart pre-filter. When set, every condition must match (AND) for the webhook to fire. Omit or null to fire on every subscribed event.

chatId.description: WhatsApp chat ID (phone@c.us for individual, groupId@g.us for groups)
WhatsApp chat ID (phone@c.us for individual, groupId@g.us for groups)

templateId.description: Template ID to render. Provide either templateId or templateName.

templateName.description: Template name to render. Provide either templateId or templateName.

vars.description: Variables substituted into {{placeholder}} tokens in the template

mimetype.description: Media MIME type (required when using base64)

emoji.description: Emoji to react with. Send an empty string to remove the reaction.

delayBetweenMessages.description: Delay between messages in ms (min: 1000, default: 3000)

batchId.description: Custom batch ID (auto-generated if not provided)

name.description: Unique template name within the session

header.description: Optional header text, prepended to the rendered body

footer.description: Optional footer text, appended to the rendered body

description.description: New group description (may be empty to clear it)

url.description: HTTP(S) URL of the plugin .zip to download and install

sessions.description: Sessions to activate the plugin for; ['*'] = all numbers, [] = none

builtIn.description: Whether this is a built-in plugin

sessionScoped.description: Whether the plugin is scoped to specific sessions (false = global)

activeSessions.description: Sessions this plugin is activated for; ['*'] = all numbers

configUi.description: Sandboxed-iframe config editor (entry HTML + optional height)

i18n.description: Localized dashboard text (name/description/config titles) per locale code

sessionConfig.description: Per-session config overrides, keyed by sessionId (secrets redacted)

error.description: Error message if plugin is in error state
